mode.title: Mode
mode.description: fetch = single pages, crawl = follow links, map = discover URLs

format.title: Output Format
format.description: Content format: markdown (default, best for LLMs), html (raw), or text (plain)

maxPages.title: Max Pages (crawl mode)
maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch when crawling

maxDepth.title: Max Depth (crawl mode)
maxDepth.description: How many links deep to follow from the starting URL

mapLimit.title: Max URLs (map mode)
mapLimit.description: Maximum number of URLs to discover in map mode

wickTunnelUrl.title: Wick Tunnel URL (optional)
wickTunnelUrl.description: URL of your local Wick instance for residential IP routing. Leave blank to use Wick's built-in engine on Apify's infrastructure.
wickTunnelUrl.sectionDescription: Connect to your own Wick Pro instance to route requests through your residential IP instead of Apify's datacenter.

wickApiKey.title: Wick API Key (optional)
wickApiKey.description: API key for your Wick tunnel endpoint
